title: gouinia mexicana
intro: Gouinia mexicana, also known as Mexican Gouinia, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Gouinia mexicana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, or used as a tincture or decoction for various herbal remedies.
